name: TRAIL MIX
desc: A hearty mix of nuts, dried fruit and chocolate — good fuel for a hike or a fireside snack.

name: INSTANT OATMEAL
desc: Single-serve oats, ready in two minutes. Comes with maple and cinnamon packets.

name: BREAKFAST KIT
desc: Eggs, bacon, bread and butter — everything for a slow morning at the cabin.

name: LOCAL IPA 6-PACK
desc: Cold, from a brewery twenty minutes down the road. Delivered chilled.

name: COLD BREW COFFEE
desc: Bottled cold brew, no fridge required until you open it.

name: FIREWOOD BUNDLE
desc: Seasoned hardwood, enough for one full evening by the fire pit.

name: FIRE STARTER KIT
desc: Kindling, matches and starter cubes — everything but the wood.

name: PROPANE CANISTER
desc: Standard 1lb canister for the cabin stove or lantern.

name: MAPLE SYRUP
desc: Small-batch, from a farm up the valley. Take a jar home.

name: HONEY JAR
desc: Raw wildflower honey from a local apiary.

name: WOOL SOCKS
desc: Thick hand-knit wool socks — cold-floor insurance.

name: TRAVEL SOAP
desc: Unscented bar soap in travel size.

name: SUNSCREEN
desc: SPF 30, broad spectrum, small enough for a daypack.
